Education

BS in Computer Science, Drexel University
Biography
Biography
Colan Biemer is a doctoral student studying artificial intelligence and games at Northeastern University's Khoury College of Computer Sciences. Advised by Seth Cooper, Colan is interested in procedural content generation (PCG) and natural language processing. Going forward, he would like to publish academic papers and receive his doctorate to then become a professor.
